title: Will China extend VAT exemption for small/micro enterprises to end-2027?
description: On 2026-05-25, China's Ministry of Finance announced an extension of the VAT reduction/exemption policy for small and micro enterprises until the end of December 2027. This question resolves based on whether the Ministry officially publishes a confirmed notice of this extension (to December 31, 2027 or later) by the cutoff date.
resolution_criteria: YES if the Ministry of Finance publishes an official notice extending the VAT exemption/reduction for small and micro enterprises to at least December 31, 2027. NO if no such official notice is published by the cutoff date.
source_news: 财政部宣布将延长针对小微企业的增值税减免政策至2027年12月底。
